src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Replace the original set of process variables (message, assignees, comments, file, date) with a new simplified set (businessKey, result) to align with updated business logic.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: private String businessKey; private Boolean result;

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove dependency on Camunda Operate service and related DTOs to simplify the controller.
Remove the OperateService field and constructor injection since the service is no longer used.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Removed private final OperateService operateService; and its usage in the constructor.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Change the base request mapping path from /api/process to /process.
Refactor the start process endpoint to use a fixed process ID constant and a typed variable object instead of a path variable and generic map.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Changed @PostMapping("/{bpmnProcessId}/start") to @PostMapping("/start") and replaced Map<String, Object> with ProcessVariables.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Change the publish message endpoint to accept a typed ProcessVariables object instead of a generic Map.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Changed @RequestBody Map<String, Object> variables to @RequestBody ProcessVariables variables.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Remove the endpoint that retrieves latest process definitions from Operate.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Deleted the latestDefinitions() method and its associated logic.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.6 to 3.3.0, which requires Java 17+ and introduces Jakarta EE namespace changes.
Replace the legacy zeebe-client-java and related protocol dependencies with the unified spring-boot-starter-camunda.
Migrate from springdoc-openapi-ui (Spring Boot 2.x) to springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui (Spring Boot 3.x).
Replace legacy spring-zeebe-test with the new spring-boot-starter-camunda-test for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
